title: BEM-867 verify runner queue step
objective:
Run script:
"""
runner = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = runner.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
script = Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py')
script_text = script.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if script.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'runner_exists': runner.exists(),
    'has_after_commit_step': 'Process workflow dispatch queue after commit' in text,
    'has_before_commit_step': 'Process workflow dispatch queue before commit' in text,
    'calls_script': 'scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' in text,
    'script_exists': script.exists(),
    'script_has_commit_state': 'def commit_state' in script_text,
    'script_has_gh': 'gh' in script_text,
}
status = 'STEP_PRESENT' if checks['has_after_commit_step'] and checks['calls_script'] else 'STEP_MISSING'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_RUNNER_QUEUE_STEP_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 runner queue step verify\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in checks.items()) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM867 runner queue step verify: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
